in his profession. He will visit many holy cities.
His female offsprings will not have much progress. This is due to the
conjunction of Rahu and Venus in Cancer.. But, as there is also Jupiter in the
same house, they will be well educated.
Between his 36th and 38th year, the native will buy lands and houses.
He will have quite a favourable period till his 68th year. Actually the dawn
of good fortune will begin from his 34th year.
The native will be susceptible to diseases caused by cold and wind.
CHART 262
In this horoscope, Mercury is posited in the 2nd to Saturn and Jupiter
and Rahu are in the third house. This indicates that the native will do business
in textiles and luxury articles. As Venus is in Leo, it indicates that the articles

184 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
will be highly-priced.
